input: Define critical quality attributes (CQAs) for a therapeutic IgG1 monoclonal antibody per ICH Q8/Q9.
Assess analytical biosimilarity between a proposed biosimilar adalimumab and Humira. What comparability studies are needed?

expected_details.statistical_approach: equivalence testing with quality range from reference product lots

input: A mAb lot shows 15% afucosylated Fc glycans (vs typical 3-5%). What is the quality impact?

expected_details.impact: increased ADCC activity (afucosylated Fc binds FcγRIIIa with higher affinity)
expected_details.clinical_concern: if ADCC is part of MOA, this could alter efficacy; if not, may alter safety
expected_details.action: investigate root cause (cell culture conditions); assess against specification
expected_details.specification: define acceptable afucosylation range based on functional impact studies

input: A biologic product shows increased aggregation (HMW from 0.5% to 3.2%) after 6 months at 5°C. Investigate.

expected_details.specification: typical HMW spec <2% — 3.2% is out of specification

input: Define CQAs for an antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) with DAR=4, maleimide-MMAE linker-payload.

analytical_methods: mass spec (intact mass for DAR confirmation)

input: What cell line characterization studies are required for a CHO-based mAb production cell line per ICH Q5A/Q5B/Q5D?

expected_details.ich_q5a: viral safety evaluation (in vitro/in vivo adventitious agent testing)

input: Design a potency assay for an anti-PD-1 monoclonal antibody.

expected_details.cell_based_assay: PD-1/PD-L1 blockade reporter assay (e.g., Promega GloResponse)
expected_details.mechanism: antibody blocks PD-1/PD-L1 interaction → reporter gene activation (NFAT-luciferase)
expected_details.alternative: mixed lymphocyte reaction (MLR) with IL-2 or IFNγ readout
expected_details.binding_assay: SPR (Biacore) measuring PD-1 binding affinity as orthogonal method
expected_details.acceptance_criteria: EC50 within X-fold of reference standard; parallelism demonstrated

input: After a manufacturing process change (scale-up from 2000L to 10000L bioreactor), what comparability studies are needed for an approved biologic?

studies: PK similarity if analytical bridge insufficient
expected_details.regulatory: may require CBE-30 or PAS depending on change magnitude

input: A novel peak appears in the CEX-HPLC chromatogram of a mAb product at the 12-month stability timepoint. Investigate.

expected_details.impact_assessment: determine if modification affects potency, safety, or immunogenicity

input: Design a viral clearance validation study for a mAb purification process. What model viruses and clearance steps?
